name: Kishibe
description:
Write your own scenario!

BLANK - NO FIRST MESSAGE;

Introduce the desired prompt in your first message, written from your character's or a general POV depending on which you feel the most comfortable! The bot will react accordingly, compilating the information it has from your message and your character's file. 

You can start roleplaying by merely putting monologues or small actions, I did it myself while testing, but don't be surprised if it is a bit random back. (The bot can't read minds, lol, you will want to specify location. Tbh, it will be fine n-n )

To run a smoother and more personalized experience, enter specifications in Memory Chat (not in your message);

  • use {{char}} as the variable to refer to Kishibe (the bot will read it as such) and {{user}} for yourself (it will read as "you" in the resume, but the bot will understand it is your character :3)

  • For example, "{{char}} is Kishibe and {{user}} is a male devil-fiend under his tutelage," you can correct errors or misinterpretations in Memory Chat :D)/

Author's notes;

We need more Kishibe bots, that's why.
